content.en:
After becoming a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor, Ye Tian only needed to continuously use various resources to ascend to the Peak Realm of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor before he could begin to impact the half-step Sixfold Primordial Ancestor realm.

And if Ye Tian wanted to raise his cultivation to the peak realm of the Fifth Ancestral Ancestor, the resources he needed to consume were unimaginable!

Even if the Void Tooth Holy Gate continued to supply resources, it was impossible for Ye Tian to completely rely on the resources of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and he had to work hard to collect some resources.

In this way, he could ascend to the peak realm of the Fifth Origin Ancestor even faster.

......

this day.

Ye Tian chatted with Feng Ming's original ancestor and discussed resource issues.

At this time, Feng Ming Origin Ancestor revealed: "Endless Origin Ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Gate will try to cultivate you to the peak of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, but there are too few resources suitable for our Fivefold Origin Ancestor, even the Void Tooth Holy Gate will not be many." Therefore, we can only give you some every few years, and we can't let you improve your cultivation as quickly as before. "

"Feng Ming Ancestor, I understand, that's why I want to find other ways to gather resources faster!" Ye Tian said.

"It's very difficult to find resources suitable for the Fivefold Origin Ancestor!" Feng Ming Origin Ancestor sighed: "Which Fivefold Origin Ancestor doesn't want to get enough resources to improve his strength? Even I, so far, I still haven't broken through to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, but the resources are not enough! At present, the resource treasure land suitable for the Fivefold Origin Ancestor in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain is occupied by the six Fivefold Divine Gates, and our Void Tooth Holy Gate is the weakest, so it occupies the least resource treasure land. Moreover, from time to time, we have to compete with other Holy Gates, and occasionally we have to lose a few treasure lands! These resources belong to the Void Tooth Holy Gate, and even fewer are allocated to each of our Fivefold Ancestors. "

"Of course, each of the Fivefold Ancestors will privately occupy some treasure land, which is also the main channel for obtaining resources. Of course, even if you occupy that kind of resource, don't tell other ancestors. The allocation of resources of the Holy Gate and the treasure of resources occupied by oneself are, in general, these two methods. "

"If the last Supreme Treasure Land appears, there will be treasures that are valuable to the Fivefold Ancestor, and it is also the goal of our Fivefold Ancestor. For example, last time, we dispatched a large number of Fivefold Primordial Ancestors from the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, defeated a group of Fivefold Primordial Ancestor Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and occupied that supreme treasure land. But such opportunities are also rare, but once they appear, the Five Origin Ancestors will not give up!"

"Right now, the resources in this area of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain are fixed by the master, and I don't know where to get the resources suitable for the Fivefold Origin Ancestor. Unless it is to go to the territory of other high-level origin domains, but that will undoubtedly offend other high-level origin domains, and thus be bombarded by the opponent's half-step six-fold origin ancestor. Therefore, I do not recommend this option either. "

"If you're lucky, you can find some resources in the Primordial Black Sea, but this probability is too low to be a solution. "

Suddenly, Feng Ming's original ancestor thought of something.

"If you can find the lair of the Primordial Black Beast, that kind of large nest, you may be able to obtain some resources, but these Primordial Black Beasts are too deeply hidden, and there are also Primordial Black Beasts that are comparable to the existence of the Fivefold Primordial Ancestor. Just like the area where our Upper Spirit Origin Domain is located, there is a primordial black beast force comparable to the fivefold holy gate - the original god palace! The original god palace also occupies a lot of resources and treasure land, but unfortunately this original god palace is very careful, and does not recruit ordinary primordial black beasts, only the primordial black beasts with huge value and the half-step five-fold original ancestor and five-fold original ancestor level are eligible to join the original god palace. Moreover, the Genshin Palace also has a half-step sixfold ancestor. Because of this, the Shangling Origin Domain has not been exterminated by the Original God Palace! If you can find the resource treasure of the Yuan God Palace, you can directly grab it, and maybe you will gain a lot. "

"Primordial Black Beast!"

Ye Tian nodded secretly.

Immediately, he chatted with Feng Ming's original ancestor for a long time before leaving.

......

"I learned from the mouth of Fengming Origin Ancestor that it is too difficult to obtain resources that are valuable to the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, and even the Fengming Origin Ancestor has not gathered the resources to break through to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, even if I get the cultivation of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, I am afraid that it will take a long time for them to be sure to raise my cultivation to the peak realm of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor. If you steal the resources of the Genshin Palace, then maybe it will be enough!"

Ye Tian was ready to hit the attention of the Yuan Divine Palace at this moment.

However, he also didn't know where Genshin Shrine was, and there was no news.

"Although I don't know where the Genshin Palace is, I do know a half-step five-fold primordial black beast at the level of the original ancestor. "

Ye Tian thought of the Nine Dust Primordial Ancestor, this was a half-step fivefold Primordial Black Beast level.

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor must have a connection with the Dawn Saint Ancestor of the Nine Light Holy Gate, he was sure.

However, he didn't know if the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor had joined the Genshin Palace, but even if he hadn't joined, he should know a little bit about the Genshin Palace!

"Then let's go find the Nine Dust Ancestor!"

Ye Tian decided.

......

Nine Dust Domains.

At this time, it was very calm here, and the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor was also cultivating with peace of mind.

After all, during this period of time, he didn't have anything to do, and the Dawn Ancestor didn't give any orders.

"Damn, why haven't I been able to break through to the Fifth Ancestral Ancestor, I don't have a clue at all!"

The Nine Dust Ancestor said in distress.

The cultivation method of the primordial black beast was different from that of a cultivator, but by refining his physical body nine times, he also stepped into the half-step sixfold primordial ancestor realm.

Moreover, he had already tempered eleven times now, and he could barely continue to temper it, but he still couldn't impact the Fifth Primordial Ancestor.

"The Dawn Holy Ancestor must have concealed the inheritance of breaking through to become a Fivefold Origin Ancestor, but I can't beat him, and I can't get the inheritance from him!

Nine Dust Ancestor muttered.

That's when it happened.

Airplanes!!!

A majestic figure descended on the Nine Dust Domain, and this figure was not any cultivator he was familiar with.

"Fivefold Ancestor, not Dawn Saint Ancestor, Nine Dust Domain has been discovered!!!"

The Nine Dust Origin Ancestor was stunned, this is a river basin, how could it be discovered by the foreign Fivefold Ancestor!

Could it be that the original ancestor of Dawn betrayed him?

No, he is just an ant in the eyes of the Dawn Ancestor, and he is still doing things for the Dawn Ancestor, and it is impossible for the Dawn Ancestor to leak the information of the Nine Dust Domain!

However, he never expected that Ye Tian's previous duplicate body was in the Nine Dust Domain, and he also had an imprint in the Nine Dust Domain, so that he could lock the coordinate location of the Nine Dust Domain.

Airplanes!!!!

A primordial black beast turned into ashes, and in an instant, only the half-step five-fold ancestor of the Nine Dust Origin Ancestor remained.

All other primordial black beasts are wiped out!

"Seniors spare their lives!"

The Nine Dust Ancestor begged for mercy.

He didn't dare to resist, and he couldn't resist!

He didn't even dare to summon the original ancestor of Dawn for fear of being discovered.
